result:
**Goal: Add an Ising Model (magnetic spin) simulation mode.**

This is a terminal-based cellular automata / complex systems simulator with 30+ modes. The next natural addition is the **Ising Model** — a statistical mechanics simulation of magnetic spins on a lattice. Spins flip based on energy minimization and thermal fluctuations (Metropolis algorithm). At low temperature, spins align into ordered domains; at the critical temperature (~2.27), a phase transition produces striking fractal-like domain boundaries; at high temperature, spins are random noise. The mode would include presets for different temperatures and allow interactive temperature adjustment, with magnetization and energy stats displayed in real-time.

Shall I implement this?
